## ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Security Vulnerability Report

**Please do NOT publicly disclose the vulnerability details in this issue!**

Instead, please:
1. Email shift+security@someone.section.me with the details
2. Include reproduction steps and impact assessment
3. Give us 90 days to provide a fix before public disclosure

For now, please provide:

## Description

<!-- Brief description of the vulnerability type -->

## Severity

<!-- Low, Medium, High, or Critical -->

## Affected Component

<!-- Which crate/component is affected? -->

## Affected Versions

<!-- Which versions are affected? -->

## Impact

<!-- What could an attacker do? What's at risk? -->

## Reported By

<!-- Your name (optional, we can credit you in the advisory) -->

**Thank you for helping us keep Execution Engine secure!**
